ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player plays */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays home games */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., NBA, NFL, MLB) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Current season of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the projection is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the projection is for */,
  "actual_fp" REAL /* Actual fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player for the day */,
  "dfn_min_proj" REAL /* Daily Fantasy Nerd minimum projected points */,
  "avg_proj" REAL /* Average projected points for the player */,
  "avg_value_proj" REAL /* Average value projected for the player */,
  "avg_skewed_min" REAL /* Average skewed minimum projected points */,
  "avg_skewed_fga" REAL /* Average skewed field goal attempts */,
  "avg_skewed_fp" REAL /* Average skewed fantasy points */,
  "proj_min_enhanced" REAL /* Projected minimum enhanced points */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the projection (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data is for */,
  "actual_fp" REAL /* Actual fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player for the day */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent the player faced */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fg_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fg_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goal attempts made by the player */,
  "three_fg_made" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "three_fg_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-point field goal attempts made by the player */,
  "ft_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "ft_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throw attempts made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projection_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the projection model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the projection model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the projection model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the projection model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projection_model_projections" (
  "model_projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model projection */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the projection the model projection is for */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that generated the projection */,
  "projection" REAL /* Projection value generated by the model */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the projection (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projection_model_projections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES projection_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projection_model_projections_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES projections ("projection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the setting belongs to */,
  "projection_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the projection model the user prefers */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the user wants to receive notifications */,
  "favorite_players" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favorite player IDs */,
  "favorite_teams" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of favorite team IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_projection_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_model_id") REFERENCES projection_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the injury report is for */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, etc.) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the transaction is for */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing, etc.) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the award is for */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
